project.name: KNX Project Maven Plugin
project.description:
Generates Java source code from an ETS .knxproj file.
For each Hauptgruppe the plugin generates a nested class containing: - strongly-typed GroupAddress constants (one per group address) - a KnxDatapoint record bundling GroupAddress, ETS name, and Calimero DPT constant - a BY_ADDRESS map (Map<GroupAddress, KnxDatapoint>) for efficient runtime lookup
Supported DPT main types with direct Calimero constant mapping: 1, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9, 10, 11, 16, 232.
Notes: The source knx project file should be versioned along with the project where the generated sources are used. Otherwise it breaks reproducibility of your build. Tested with projects saved with ETS version 6 only.
Goal: knxproj:generate (default phase: generate-sources)
Parameters: ┌──────────────────────┬─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┬──────────────────────────────────────────┬──────────┐ │ Parameter │ CLI property │ Default │ Required │ ├──────────────────────┼─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼──────────────────────────────────────────┼──────────┤ │ knxprojFile │ -Dknxproj.file=... │ – │ yes │ │ │ Path to the ETS project file (.knxproj). │ │ │ ├──────────────────────┼─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼──────────────────────────────────────────┼──────────┤ │ packageName │ -Dknxproj.packageName=... │ – │ yes │ │ │ Java package for the generated class, │ │ │ │ │ e.g. com.example.knx. │ │ │ ├──────────────────────┼─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼──────────────────────────────────────────┼──────────┤ │ outputDirectory │ -Dknxproj.outputDirectory=... │ ${project.build.directory}/ │ no │ │ │ Root output directory for generated sources. │ generated-sources/knx │ │ │ │ The package sub-directories are created automatically. │ │ │ ├──────────────────────┼─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼──────────────────────────────────────────┼──────────┤ │ className │ -Dknxproj.className=... │ KNXGroupAddresses │ no │ │ │ Simple name of the generated Java class. │ │ │ ├──────────────────────┼─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼──────────────────────────────────────────┼──────────┤ │ groupAddressClass │ -Dknxproj.groupAddressClass=... │ io.calimero.GroupAddress │ no │ │ │ Fully-qualified Calimero GroupAddress type used in the │ │ │ │ │ generated constants. Override if you use a forked or │ │ │ │ │ repackaged Calimero artifact. │ │ │ ├──────────────────────┼─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼──────────────────────────────────────────┼──────────┤ │ skip │ -Dknxproj.skip=true │ false │ no │ │ │ Set to true to skip execution of the goal entirely. │ │ │ └──────────────────────┴─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┴──────────────────────────────────────────┴──────────┘
Runtime dependency of the generated code: The generated class imports io.calimero.GroupAddress and io.calimero.dptxlator.DPT (plus specific DPTXlator* classes for the DPT types used in your project). The consuming project must declare a dependency on the Calimero core library:
<dependency> <groupId>io.calimero</groupId> <artifactId>calimero-core</artifactId> <version>2.6.x</version> <!-- use the version you target --> </dependency>
Minimal configuration example in a consuming project:
<plugin> <groupId>io.github.alramlechner</groupId> <artifactId>knxproj-maven-plugin</artifactId> <version>1.1.0</version> <executions> <execution> <goals><goal>generate</goal></goals> <configuration> <!-- Required --> <knxprojFile>${project.basedir}/src/main/knx/MyProject.knxproj</knxprojFile> <packageName>com.example.knx</packageName> <!-- Optional --> <!-- <className>KNXGroupAddresses</className> --> <!-- <outputDirectory>${project.build.directory}/generated-sources/knx</outputDirectory> --> <!-- <groupAddressClass>io.calimero.GroupAddress</groupAddressClass> --> <!-- <skip>false</skip> --> </configuration> </execution> </executions> </plugin>
